summary: Iteration 123: Tested three bug fixes - (1) Supplier payment credit deduction for cash/bank payments, (2) Expense delete error handling, (3) AdvancedSearch filter auto-apply. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified filter auto-apply and delete button visibility.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. This is a React/HTML nesting warning that should be fixed for proper HTML semantics.

critical_code_review_comments: ExpensesPage.jsx lines 504-590: Table rows wrapped in <span> elements causing HTML nesting warnings. Consider refactoring to use proper table structure or React.Fragment.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing supplier data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier payment credit logic verified: cash/bank payments reduce current_credit, credit payments increase it, delete reverses the change. AdvancedSearch filter auto-apply works via handleFilterChange calling onSearch immediately (lines 83-90 in AdvancedSearch.jsx). Delete buttons in ExpensesPage are visible when expanding day rows.

supplier_payment_cash_reduces_credit.test_case: Cash payment to supplier reduces their current_credit balance
supplier_payment_cash_reduces_credit.details: Payment with payment_mode='cash' correctly reduced supplier credit using max(0, current_credit - amount) logic

supplier_payment_bank_reduces_credit.test_case: Bank payment to supplier reduces their current_credit balance
supplier_payment_bank_reduces_credit.details: Payment with payment_mode='bank' correctly reduced supplier credit

supplier_payment_credit_increases_balanc.details: Payment with payment_mode='credit' correctly increased supplier credit (existing behavior preserved)

supplier_payment_delete_reverses_change.test_case: Deleting a payment reverses the credit change
supplier_payment_delete_reverses_change.details: Deleting cash payment correctly restored supplier credit to original value

expense_delete_error_handling.test_case: 404 error returns proper 'detail' field for toast display
expense_delete_error_handling.details: Expense not found returns {"detail": "Expense not found"} which frontend can display via toast.error

expense_delete_button_visible.test_case: Delete button (Trash icon) visible in expanded expense rows for admin
expense_delete_button_visible.details: 54 delete buttons found, visible in expanded day rows

advanced_search_category_auto_apply.test_case: Category filter auto-applies immediately when selecting from dropdown
advanced_search_category_auto_apply.details: Selecting 'Salary' category showed 'Active: Category: Salary' badge and filtered to 1 entry without clicking Apply

advanced_search_payment_mode_auto_apply.details: Selecting 'Cash' payment mode filtered results immediately
